allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Cloudflare R2 cloud sync feature

Implemented complete cloud sync system using Cloudflare R2 and Workers:
- Created R2 bucket ''scheduler-data'' for storing JSON files
- Built Cloudflare Worker with upload/download/list endpoints
- Added Python CloudflareSync client for seamless integration
- Added "Sync Now" button to UI toolbar
- Auto-download on app startup \(configurable\)
- Updated config files with cloudflare_sync section
- Created comprehensive setup documentation

Features:
- One-click sync via "Sync Now" button
- Auto-sync on startup \(downloads latest data from cloud\)
- Last-write-wins conflict resolution
- Completely free \(Cloudflare R2 free tier\)
- Works across all machines with internet access

Files synced: tasks, timer state, config, completed logs, stats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Cloudflare R2 cloud sync feature

Implemented complete cloud sync system using Cloudflare R2 and Workers:
- Created R2 bucket ''scheduler-data'' for storing JSON files
- Built Cloudflare Worker with upload/download/list endpoints
- Added Python CloudflareSync client for seamless integration
- Added "Sync Now" button to UI toolbar
- Auto-download on app startup \(configurable\)
- Updated config files with cloudflare_sync section
- Created comprehensive setup documentation

Features:
- One-click sync via "Sync Now" button
- Auto-sync on startup \(downloads latest data from cloud\)
- Last-write-wins conflict resolution
- Completely free \(Cloudflare R2 free tier\)
- Works across all machines with internet access

Files synced: tasks, timer state, config, completed logs, stats

Also includes timer system from previous session with Voice Monkey integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cmd /c "if not exist D:\\secrets mkdir D:\\secrets")
